news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY, RNTY and SOXY
YieldMax® Target 12™ Big 50 Option Income ETF (BIGY) Celebrates Its One-Year Anniversary
YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY, RNTY and SOXY
YieldMax™ ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY ($0.4609) and SOXY ($0.4384)
YieldMax™ ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY ($0.4582) and SOXY ($0.4266)
YieldMax™ ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY ($0.5025) and SOXY ($0.4883)
YieldMax™ ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY ($0.5130) and SOXY ($0.5256)
YieldMax™ Launches Its First Target 12™ ETF Introducing the Target 12™ Big 50 Option Income ETF (BIGY)

holdings.infoBox: BIGY is an equity ETF with a total of 162 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.51%, NVIDIA at 6.41%, Alphabet at 5.18%, Amazon.com at 4.85%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.99%.

overview.description: The YieldMax Target 12 Big 50 Option Income ETF (BIGY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that targets an annual income level of 12% by investing in 50 large-cap US companies while employing a covered call strategy. BIGY was launched on Nov 20, 2024 and is issued by YieldMax.
